code:
%% Circuit Breaker Pattern - Fault Tolerance %% Version: 1.0.0 %% Date: 2025-10-27 %% Description: Circuit breaker pattern for webhook delivery and external service calls stateDiagram-v2 [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] --> Closed: Initial State Closed --> Open: Failure Threshold Exceeded
(IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream) Closed --> Closed: Successful Request
(IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic) Closed --> Closed: Failed Request
(IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic) Open --> HalfOpen: Timeout Elapsed
(IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream) Open --> Open: Request Attempted
(IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream) HalfOpen --> Closed: Test Request Successful
(IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker) HalfOpen --> Open: Test Request Failed
(IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController) HalfOpen --> HalfOpen: Waiting for Test
(IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic) note right of Closed CLOSED STATE - All requests flow through - Monitor failure rate - Track response times - Increment error counter end note note right of Open OPEN STATE - Block all requests - Return cached response - Or return error immediately - Wait for timeout period - Log all blocked attempts end note note right of HalfOpen HALF-OPEN STATE - Allow test requests - Limited throughput - Monitor success rate - Quick transition decision end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为工业物联网场景设计一个熔断器模式的状态图，核心是要处理MQTT Broker和PLC Logic之间的故障容错。初始状态应该是Closed，所有请求正常通过。
明白，Closed状态下需要监控故障率。那从Closed跳转到Open的触发条件是什么？是TelemetryStream报告故障阈值超标吗？
对，当TelemetryStream检测到连续失败次数超过阈值，就触发Failure Threshold Exceeded事件，进入Open状态。同时Successful Request和Failed Request都应该在Closed状态内部自循环，由PLC Logic处理。
已添加Closed到Open的转换，以及Closed的自循环。Open状态需要配置超时机制吗？比如等待一段时间后尝试恢复？
是的，Open状态经过Timeout Elapsed后进入HalfOpen，这个转换也由TelemetryStream触发。另外Open状态下如果还有请求尝试，应该直接拒绝，保持Open。
HalfOpen状态的行为我有点疑问：测试请求成功时回到Closed，失败时回到Open，这两个触发源分别是MQTT Broker和ActuatorController，对吗？
没错。测试成功由MQTT Broker确认，测试失败由ActuatorController上报。另外HalfOpen还有个等待测试的自循环，由PLC Logic维护。
状态转换都画好了。现在给三个状态加上右侧注释：Closed说明全流量通过和故障监控，Open说明阻断请求和日志记录，HalfOpen说明限流测试和快速决策。
